name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat the margarine and sugar until creamy. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Roll dough into 48 balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Press a maraschino cherry in the center of each ball.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Melt the chocolate chips and condensed milk over low heat, stirring in the reserved cherry syrup.
7. Spoon a small amount of melted mixture over each cherry.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool on wire racks.
Recipe:
Stir together first 5 dry ingredients. Beat margarine and sugar; then add egg and vanilla. Gradually add flour mixture until blended. Shape dough into 48 balls on ungreased cookie sheets. Press down center with thumb. Put well drained cherry in center. Melt chocolate chips and milk over low heat. Stir in reserved cherry syrup. Spoon melted mixture over each cherry. Spread to cover. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes.
